name: Spawn
description: A simple object spawner that instantiates a stem at the spawner's location. Supports collision-based automatic spawning or trigger-based manual activation. Essential for creating item spawns, enemy generators, or object placement systems.
documentation:
## Spawn
Spawn a stem at this location during gameplay.

### Settings
- **Spawn Object** - The stem to spawn

### Tips
- Use **Start on Trigger** for event-driven spawning
author: stemstudio

startOnTrigger.name: Start on Trigger
startOnTrigger.description: When enabled, the object spawns only when activated by an event trigger instead of automatically on collision.

stem.name: Spawn Object
stem.description: The stem to spawn at this location.
